012],[270,502,1776530206027],[286,504,1776530206038],[304,506,1776530206049],[320,507,1776530206060],[331,508,1776530206074],[337,509,1776530206090],[338,509,1776530206106],[336,509,1776530206114],[335,509,1776530206121],[333,510,1776530206146],[332,510,1776530206158],[331,510,1776530206179],[329,510,1776530206187],[328,510,1776530206195],[327,510,1776530206202],[327,509,1776530206221],[326,509,1776530206227],[326,508,1776530206232],[325,506,1776530206242],[325,505,1776530206257],[325,504,1776530206267],[324,503,1776530206277],[324,502,1776530206290],[323,501,1776530206296],[323,500,1776530206308],[322,499,1776530206319],[321,499,1776530206328],[320,499,1776530206348],[319,499,1776530206374],[319,498,1776530206386],[318,498,1776530206402],[317,497,1776530206416],[316,497,1776530206437],[316,496,1776530206451],[315,496,1776530206467]],"mm-mp":17.386944181646168,"md":[[328,510,1776530206206]],"md-mp":4115.25,"mu":[[328,510,1776530206358]],"mu-mp":4136.75},"v":1,"tc":{}}
